description: February invoice exceeds the $10,000 monthly platform fee cap.

clause_ref.text: Customer shall pay Vendor a monthly platform fee not to exceed Ten Thousand U.S. Dollars ($10,000) per calendar month for the subscribed services.

evidence: Billed $12,750.00 vs $10,000.00 monthly cap — $2,750.00 over limit.

description: March invoice submitted without a purchase order reference.

clause_ref.text: Vendor shall reference a valid Nextera purchase order number on every invoice submitted for payment.

evidence: Invoice INV-2025-003 has no po_number field.

description: January 2026 invoice falls outside the contract term.

clause_ref.text: This Agreement is effective January 1, 2025 and expires December 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated per Section 9.

evidence: Invoice date 2026-01-15 is after contract end date 2025-12-31.

description: Duplicate submission of invoice number INV-2025-001.

clause_ref.text: Vendor shall not submit duplicate invoices for the same billing period or invoice number.

evidence: Invoice number INV-2025-001 already received as inv-2025-001 on 2025-01-31.
